allow: PowerShell(Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing; $src = [System.Drawing.Image]::FromFile\('C:\\Users\\marco\\Desktop\\gardens-of-kadesh-master\\appicon.png'\); $sizes = @{ 'mdpi'=48; 'hdpi'=72; 'xhdpi'=96; 'xxhdpi'=144; 'xxxhdpi'=192 }; foreach \($k in $sizes.Keys\) { $sz = $sizes[$k]; $bmp = New-Object System.Drawing.Bitmap\($sz,$sz\); $g = [System.Drawing.Graphics]::FromImage\($bmp\); $g.InterpolationMode = 'HighQualityBicubic'; $g.SmoothingMode = 'HighQuality'; $g.PixelOffsetMode = 'HighQuality'; $g.DrawImage\($src,0,0,$sz,$sz\); $out = "C:\\Users\\marco\\Desktop\\gardens-of-kadesh-master\\android\\app\\src\\main\\res\\mipmap-$k\\ic_launcher.png"; $bmp.Save\($out,[System.Drawing.Imaging.ImageFormat]::Png\); $g.Dispose\(\); $bmp.Dispose\(\); Write-Output "$k -> $sz" }; $src.Dispose\(\))
